symbols.name: Oxford 3000
symbols.description: Marks an Oxford 3000 word together with its CEFR level.

symbols.name: Oxford 5000
symbols.description: Marks an Oxford 5000 word together with its CEFR level.

symbols.name: Oxford 3000
symbols.description: Marks a word as part of the Oxford 3000 list.

symbols.name: CEFR
symbols.description: Marks the CEFR level of a word or phrase.

symbols.name: OPAL written
symbols.description: Marks a word from the OPAL written word list.

symbols.name: OPAL written
symbols.dictionary: Oxford Learner's Dictionary of Academic English
symbols.description: Marks a word from the OPAL written word list.

symbols.name: OPAL spoken
symbols.description: Marks a word from the OPAL spoken word list.

symbols.name: OPAL spoken
symbols.dictionary: Oxford Learner's Dictionary of Academic English
symbols.description: Marks a word from the OPAL spoken word list.

symbols.name: Academic Word List
symbols.description: Marks a word as part of the Academic Word List.

symbols.name: My Wordlists
symbols.description: Adds a word, phrasal verb, or idiom to My Word Lists.

symbols.name: derivative symbol
symbols.description: Marks a derivative form that can be understood from its headword.

symbols.name: phrasal verb arrow
symbols.description: Marks phrasal verbs where the object may appear before or after the particle.

symbols.name: cross reference arrow
symbols.description: Marks a cross-reference to a related dictionary entry.

symbols.name: external link icon
symbols.description: Marks a cross-reference to the corresponding entry in another dictionary.
